scenario: A user styles an outfit in the virtual dressing room

explainer.title: Same engine, a completely different idea.
explainer.body: Nothing here is hard-coded for ClearList. We dropped in a new scenario and the board redrew itself, same renderer, different words. This one is Vinti: a virtual dressing room where you build a closet, try looks on your own avatar, and let an AI stylist suggest outfits... long before any swapping or marketplace exists.
explainer.read: Read left → right for the journey. Read top → bottom to see everything standing behind each step.

steps.name: Add a clothing item
steps.def: Snaps or imports a piece they own

steps.name: Try it on
steps.def: Sees the look on their avatar

steps.name: Save & share
steps.def: Keeps the look, shows a friend

pitfall.6: Nothing to do after one look

rationale.1: Low-effort add = a full closet fast
rationale.4: The AI stylist is the aha moment
rationale.5: Seeing it on you beats a flat photo

question.2: How many items before it feels useful?
question.6: What pulls them back next week?
